category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Moldova EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入摩尔多瓦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入摩爾多瓦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Moldova CE/EN-oriented market entry conditions, ANRE/Moldelectrica grid and charging-service review, IEC 61851-1 pathway alignment, Type 2 / CCS2 interop considerations, OCPP backend interoperability, and UN 38.3 transport documentation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与摩尔多瓦CE/EN导向市场准入条件、ANRE与Moldelectrica的并网与充电服务审查、IEC 61851-1路径对齐、Type 2 / CCS2互操作、OCPP后台协议互通以及UN 38.3运输文件进行对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與摩爾多瓦CE/EN導向市場准入條件、ANRE與Moldelectrica之併網與充電服務審查、IEC 61851-1路徑對齊、Type 2 / CCS2互操作、OCPP後台協議互通以及UN 38.3運輸文件進行對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CE scope determination, ANRE licensing assessment, grid interconnection approval, customs determination, market-access approval, or EV network service authorization. Exporters, importers, charging-network operators, and installers should verify current Moldova ISM, ANRE, Moldelectrica, electrical-installation, payment, and customs requirements before shipment, sale, installation, and operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CE适用范围裁定、ANRE许可评审、并网批准、海关裁定、市场准入批准或电动车网络运营授权。出口商、进口商、充电网络运营方和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前应与合格摩尔多瓦专业人士核验现行ISM、ANRE、Moldelectrica、电气安装、支付和海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CE適用範圍裁定、ANRE許可評審、併網批准、海關裁定、市场准入批准或電動車網路營運授權。出口商、進口商、充電網路營運方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前，應與合格摩爾多瓦專業人士核驗現行ISM、ANRE、Moldelectrica、電氣安裝、支付和海關要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Moldova, the practical baseline is CE/EN-aligned product documentation plus Type 2 / CCS2 interoperability planning for the target model, plus ANRE and Moldelectrica site-level grid and service review. Moldova is 50 Hz like China but uses 230/400 V nominal voltage, so charger settings and protections should be confirmed against site design. Because Moldova is landlocked, project logistics usually involve Romanian transit and Giurgiulești corridor planning.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的充电桩出口摩尔多瓦时，实际基线是CE/EN导向产品文档，加上目标机型的Type 2 / CCS2互操作规划，再叠加ANRE和Moldelectrica的现场并网与服务审查。摩尔多瓦频率为50 Hz与中国一致，但名义电压为230/400 V，因此应核实充电桩设置和保护。由于摩尔多瓦是内陆国，项目物流通常涉及罗马尼亚过境和Giurgiulești走廊规划。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁出口摩爾多瓦時，實務基準是CE/EN導向產品文件，加上目標機型的Type 2 / CCS2互操作規劃，再疊加ANRE與Moldelectrica的現場並網與服務審查。摩爾多瓦頻率為50 Hz與中國一致，但名義電壓為230/400 V，因此應核實充電樁設定與保護。由於摩爾多瓦為內陸國，項目物流通常涉及羅馬尼亞過境和Giurgiulești走廊規劃。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, grid operator, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
